{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Elder seal
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An [[Elder seal]] surrounds [[Jerri]] and her guide.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
